case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. WILLIAM NEIDER

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT NEIDER, WILLIAM DBA THE RESTORATION CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEIDER, WILLIAM DBA THE RESTORATION CO. $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $27.62 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,002.62, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
